CustomField.formula: IF(Unit_Price__c != UnitPriceWithDiscount__c , ((Total_Unit_Price__c - (Total_Unit_Price__c * Cash_Discount__c)) + ((Total_Unit_Price__c - (Total_Unit_Price__c * Cash_Discount__c)) * Sales_Tax__c ) ), Total_Unit_Price__c + (Total_Unit_Price__c * Sales_Tax__c ))
CustomField.label: Total after discount
